quicksight.template.customactionurlopera: The URL operation that opens a link to another webpage.

quicksight.template.customactionurlopera.Description: The target of the `CustomActionURLOperation`.  Valid values are defined as follows:  +  `NEW_TAB`: Opens the target URL in a new browser tab.+  `NEW_WINDOW`: Opens the target URL in a new browser window.+  `SAME_TAB`: Opens the target URL in the same browser tab.
